registers.name: SystemAuto
registers.description: Let the EFOY decide when to turn itself on and off automatically.

registers.name: SystemReset
registers.description: Reset any warnings and errors, clear the warning and error registers.

registers.name: ResetCycleMonitor
registers.description: Reset all cycle monitoring units. The values average duration, last duration and count are set to zero. The cumulated cycle durations are not reset. Causes battery degraded error to be reset.

registers.name: ResetAutoCm
registers.description: Reset the automatic charge cycle monitoring unit. The values average duration, last duration and count are set to zero. The cumulated cycle duration is not reset. Causes battery degraded error to be reset.

registers.name: ResetManCm
registers.description: Reset the manual charge cycle monitoring unit. The values average duration, last duration and count are set to zero. The cumulated cycle duration is not reset.

registers.name: UnlockTLP
registers.description: Unlock the system when it is in transport lock mode.

registers.name: LogSystemOffOk
registers.description: Indicates whether the system can be turned off manually

registers.name: LogSystemOnOk
registers.description: Indicates whether the system can be turned on manually

registers.name: CurrentErrorActive
registers.description: A critical problem will prevent the fuel cell from operating correctly. Immediate maintenance is required for continued operation.

registers.name: CurrentWarningActive
registers.description: Whether any warning is active. A warning indicates that maintenance should be done on the system soon.

registers.name: NewBatConfigBad
registers.description: Whether the new configuration as entered by the user is invalid

registers.name: fuelBelow50
registers.description: Remaining fuel in cartridge or all active FM ports is less than 50%

registers.name: fuelBelow30
registers.description: Remaining fuel in cartridge or all active FM ports is less than 30%

registers.name: fuelBelow20
registers.description: Remaining fuel in cartridge or all active FM ports is less than 20%

registers.name: fuelBelow10
registers.description: Remaining fuel in cartridge or all active FM ports is less than 10%

registers.name: FmdFS2Sensor
registers.description: Current status from the Fmd FS Sensor 1 = Fuel level above sensor or no sensor connected 0 = Fuel level below sensor

registers.name: SystemType
registers.description: First part of the serial number

registers.name: AssemblyDate
registers.description: Middle part of the serial number

registers.name: SequentualNumber
registers.description: Last part of the serial number

registers.name: LogWOutCum
registers.description: Cumulative power generated by the EFOY

registers.name: LogBatSoc
registers.description: State of the charge of the smart battery,

registers.name: LogSystemOnReason
registers.description: Reason the system has turned on (details see chapter 1.6)

enum_values.1: System has been turned on manually
enum_values.2: The system has turned on automatically because the battery required charging
enum_values.3: The system has turned on automatically to enter frost protection mode
enum_values.4: The system turned on automatically to enter deep discharge protection mode

registers.name: LogSystemOffReason
registers.description: Reason the system has turned off (details see chapter 1.6)

enum_values.1: System has been turned off manually
enum_values.2: The system turned off automatically because the battery has been fully charged
enum_values.3: The system has turned off automatically because the maximum charge time has been reached
enum_values.4: The system has turned off automatically because an overvoltage at the output was detected
enum_values.5: The system has turned off because frost protection mode has finished
enum_values.6: The system has turned off because the fuel cartridge has depleted
enum_values.7: The system has turned off because methanol in reservoir and tubes is depleted for UN3363 requirement
enum_values.8: The system has turned off because an error has occurred

registers.name: CurrentErrorCode
registers.description: The actual error code (Major) when ErrorActive is set, 0 otherwise.

registers.name: CurrentWarningCode
registers.description: The actual warning code when WarningActive is set, 0 otherwise.

registers.name: SystemState
registers.description: Current EFOY state (for details, see chapter 1.5)

registers.name: OperatingMode
registers.description: Current EFOY operating mode (for details, see chapter 1.5)

registers.name: CMAutoAvg
registers.description: Average cycle duration of automatic cycles

registers.name: CMAutoCum
registers.description: Total duration of all automatic cycles.

registers.name: CMManAvg
registers.description: Average cycle duration of manual cycles

registers.name: CMManCum
registers.description: Total duration of all manual cycles.

registers.name: CMDDPAvg
registers.description: Average cycle duration in deep discharge protection mode

registers.name: CMDDPLast
registers.description: Last deep discharge protection cycle duration

registers.name: CMDDPCum
registers.description: Total duration of all deep discharge protection cycles.

registers.name: CMDDPCnt
registers.description: Total number of cycles in deep discharge protection mode

registers.name: CMFPAvg
registers.description: Average cycle duration in frost protection mode

registers.name: CMFPCum
registers.description: Total duration of all frost protection cycles.

registers.name: CMFPCnt
registers.description: Total number of cycles in frost protection mode

registers.name: CMErrAvg
registers.description: Average duration of cycles aborted by an error

registers.name: CMErrLast
registers.description: Last duration of a cycle aborted by an error

registers.name: CMErrCum
registers.description: Total duration of all cycles aborted by an error.

registers.name: CMErrCnt
registers.description: Total number of cycles aborted by an error

registers.name: CMRstAvg
registers.description: Average duration of cycles aborted by a system reset

registers.name: CMRstLast
registers.description: Last duration of a cycle aborted by a system reset

registers.name: CMRstCum
registers.description: Total duration of all cycles aborted by a system reset.

registers.name: CMRstCnt
registers.description: Total number of cycles aborted by a system reset

registers.name: BatBocStatus
registers.description: Current begin of charge voltage (= switch on voltage)

registers.name: BatBocMin
registers.description: Minimum configurable begin of charge voltage

registers.name: BatBocMax
registers.description: Maximum configurable begin of charge voltage

registers.name: BatEocStatus
registers.description: Current end of charge voltage (= switch off voltage)

registers.name: BatEocMin
registers.description: Minimum configurable end of charge voltage

registers.name: BatEocMax
registers.description: Maximum configurable end of charge voltage

registers.name: BatDdpMin
registers.description: Minimum configurable deep discharge protection voltage

registers.name: BatDdpMax
registers.description: Maximum configurable deep discharge protection voltage

registers.name: BatDdpSocStatus
registers.description: Current SOC at which deep discharge protection for smart batteries becomes active

registers.name: BatDdpSocMin
registers.description: Minimum configurable deep discharge protection SOC

registers.name: BatDdpSocMax
registers.description: Maximum configurable deep discharge protection SOC

registers.name: CartRlVolStatus
registers.description: Remaining relative volume in the currently configured cartridge

registers.name: CartAbVolStatus
registers.description: Remaining absolute volume in the fuel cartridge

registers.name: FmdPort1TypeStatus
registers.description: FM port 1 actual cartridge type (see chapter 1.8)

registers.name: FmdPort2TypeStatus
registers.description: FM port 2 actual cartridge type (see chapter 1.8)

registers.name: FmdPort3TypeStatus
registers.description: FM port 3 actual cartridge type (see chapter 1.8)

registers.name: FmdPort4TypeStatus
registers.description: FM port 4 actual cartridge type(see chapter 1.8)

registers.name: FmdPort5TypeStatus
registers.description: FM port 5 actual cartridge type (see chapter 1.8)

registers.name: FmdPort6TypeStatus
registers.description: FM port 6 actual cartridge type (see chapter 1.8)

registers.name: FmdPort7TypeStatus
registers.description: FM port 7 actual cartridge type (see chapter 1.8)

registers.name: FmdPort8TypeStatus
registers.description: FM port 8 actual cartridge type (see chapter 1.8)

registers.name: FmdActivePortNum
registers.description: The number of the active port

registers.name: FmdPort1CapStatus
registers.description: FM port 1 capacity of the current cartridge

registers.name: FmdPort2CapStatus
registers.description: FM port 2 capacity of the current cartridge

registers.name: FmdPort3CapStatus
registers.description: FM port 3 capacity of the current cartridge

registers.name: FmdPort4CapStatus
registers.description: FM port 4 capacity of the current cartridge

registers.name: FmdPort5CapStatus
registers.description: FM port 5 capacity of the current cartridge

registers.name: FmdPort6CapStatus
registers.description: FM port 6 capacity of the current cartridge

registers.name: FmdPort7CapStatus
registers.description: FM port 7 capacity of the current cartridge

registers.name: FmdPort8CapStatus
registers.description: FM port 8 capacity of the current cartridge

registers.name: FmdErrorMajor
registers.description: The actual error code major when a Fmd Error is set, 0 otherwise.

registers.name: FmdErrorMinor
registers.description: The actual error code minor when a Fmd Error is set, 0 otherwise.

registers.name: FmdLastErrorMajor
registers.description: The previously set Fmd error code.

registers.name: FmdLastErrorMinor
registers.description: The previously set Fmd error code mi-nor.

registers.name: ClusterControllerIP
registers.description: Currently configured IP of the cluster controller

registers.name: ClusterControllerPin
registers.description: The cluster controller pin, if 0 then there is no pin.

registers.name: ClusterClientPin
registers.description: Currently configured client pin, if 0 then there is no pin configured.

registers.name: LogpDifComp
registers.description: Compensated differential pressure. The zero point offset is taken into consideration.

registers.name: LogFL
registers.description: Fill level of the fluid in the internal system (intermediate tank + tubes).

registers.name: LogSysOpTime
registers.description: System operating time (hours the system is connected to a battery).

registers.name: LogDmfcPhase
registers.description: Operation phase of the DMFC (0 = idle, 1 = start phase, 2 = charging).

registers.name: LogTStackMinTime
registers.description: Minimum stack temperature time stamp (UNIX time stamp)*.

registers.name: LogTStackMaxTime
registers.description: Maximum stack temperature time stamp (UNIX time stamp)*.

registers.name: LogErrorTime
registers.description: RTC date and time when the currently active error was set (UNIX time stamp)*.

registers.name: LogLastErrorTime
registers.description: RTC date and time when the previ-ously active error was set (UNIX time stamp)*.

registers.name: LogWarningTime
registers.description: RTC date and time when the currently active warning was set (UNIX time stamp)*.

registers.name: LogLastWarningTime
registers.description: RTC date and time when the previ-ously active warning was set (UNIX time stamp)*.

registers.name: LogSystemTime
registers.description: System time (UNIX time stamp)*. *UNIX time stamp are set to “0” (01.January 1970 00:00:00), if no valid time stamp is available.

registers.name: BatDdpSocConfig
registers.description: New SOC at which deep discharge protection for smart batteries becomes active

registers.name: CartCustTypeVolConfig
registers.description: Set the capacity of a custom fuel cartridge

registers.name: CartRlVolConfig
registers.description: Set the cartridge level to a relative fill

registers.name: FmdPort1TypeConfig
registers.description: FM port 1 new cartridge type (see chapter 1.8)

registers.name: FmdPort1CapConfig
registers.description: FM port 1 new capacity (custom cartridge type only)

registers.name: FmdPort2TypeConfig
registers.description: FM port 2 new cartridge type (see chapter 1.8)

registers.name: FmdPort2CapConfig
registers.description: FM port 2 new capacity (custom cartridge type only)

registers.name: FmdPort3TypeConfig
registers.description: FM port 3 new cartridge type (see chapter 1.8)

registers.name: FmdPort3CapConfig
registers.description: FM port 3 new capacity (custom cartridge type only)

registers.name: FmdPort4TypeConfig
registers.description: FM port 4 new cartridge type (see chapter 1.8)

registers.name: FmdPort4CapConfig
registers.description: FM port 4 new capacity (custom cartridge type only)

registers.name: FmdPort5TypeConfig
registers.description: FM port 5 new cartridge type (see chapter 1.8)

registers.name: FmdPort5CapConfig
registers.description: FM port 5 new capacity (custom cartridge type only)

registers.name: FmdPort6TypeConfig
registers.description: FM port 6 new cartridge type (see chapter 1.8)

registers.name: FmdPort6CapConfig
registers.description: FM port 6 new capacity (custom cartridge type only)

registers.name: FmdPort7TypeConfig
registers.description: FM port 7 new cartridge type (see chapter 1.8)

registers.name: FmdPort7CapConfig
registers.description: FM port 7 new capacity (custom cartridge type only)

registers.name: FmdPort8TypeConfig
registers.description: FM port 8 new cartridge type (see chapter 1.8)

registers.name: FmdPort8CapConfig
registers.description: FM port 8 new capacity (custom cartridge type only)

registers.name: ClusterRoleConfig
registers.description: Config Cluster Role of the EFOY

registers.name: ClusterClientPin
registers.description: Config Cluster Client Pin (numeric be- tween 0 and 100’000’000)

values.1: System has been turned on manually
values.2: The system has turned on automatically because the battery required charging
values.3: The system has turned on automatically to enter frost protection mode
values.4: The system turned on automatically to enter deep discharge protection mode

values.1: System has been turned off manually
values.2: The system turned off automatically because the battery has been fully charged
values.3: The system has turned off automatically because the maximum charge time has been reached
values.4: The system has turned off automatically because an overvoltage at the output was detected
values.5: The system has turned off because frost protection mode has finished
values.6: The system has turned off because the fuel cartridge has depleted
values.7: The system has turned off because methanol in reservoir and tubes is depleted for UN3363
values.8: The system has turned off because an error has occurred
